overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 following a child character through a futuristic neon-lit city plaza, ascending a yellow staircase, traversing a covered billboard corridor, and emerging to overlook a busy street lined with mega-skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial plaza with benches and planters

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza following a child in a yellow jacket, passing by illuminated planters and benches

notable_agents.action: child in yellow jacket walking ahead toward the stairs

entered.detail: large rectangular planter with glowing blue neon trim and wooden benches attached
tall futuristic glass tower with multiple illuminated windows and advertisements
modern concrete seating arranged along the walkway
tall palm tree growing from a raised planter bed
building facade with illuminated 'FOURTH WALL' signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic city plaza at dusk, with neon lights illuminating the scene. The camera follows a child in a yellow jacket walking ahead through the pedestrian area, passing blue-lit planters and concrete benches. Glass skyscrapers tower in the background while the 'FOURTH WALL' building is visible on the left.

events.description: begins ascending the yellow staircase, transitioning from flat ground to stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the yellow stairs following the child, moving from street level to an elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: child climbing the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: bright yellow painted concrete staircase with metal handrails leading upward
grey concrete stair treads with yellow painted side walls

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the child up a bright yellow outdoor staircase, transitioning from the plaza to an elevated level. The stair walls are painted vivid yellow with metal railings, and the glass skyscraper shifts to the left as the camera ascends. The sky is fully visible above as they climb toward the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with billboard walls

events.description: enters covered walkway with illuminated billboard advertisements on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor following the child, passing illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: child walking through the covered walkway ahead

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian bridge with roof and walls covered in digital billboards
tall walls on both sides displaying large digital advertisements and neon graphics
large pink neon sign reading 'WATSON WHORE' with broadcast schedule
vertical cyan neon light tubes illuminating the entrance area
circular pink neon sign with radiating spikes at the far end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway illuminated by vibrant neon billboards on both sides. The corridor features the prominent 'WATSON WHORE' sign in pink neon on the right wall, while vertical cyan tubes light the entrance. The child continues walking ahead toward a pink spiked neon sign at the far end, with trash scattered on the concrete floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook of downtown street with mega-skyscrapers

events.description: exits covered walkway to open overlook with view of city street below
camera tilts upward to focus on the towering skyscrapers and advertisements above

agents.ego_description: emerging from the corridor to overlook the street, then pausing to look up at the towering buildings

entered.detail: view of multi-lane street below with moving vehicles and palm tree median
massive interconnected skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and illuminated windows
line of palm trees along the median of the street below

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway to an open overlook revealing a sweeping view of a downtown street lined with palm trees and mega-skyscrapers. The street below has sparse traffic moving along the multi-lane road. The camera then tilts upward to showcase the towering glass buildings covered in massive holographic advertisements against the darkening blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit city plaza that ascends and transitions into a sweeping urban overlook. It begins by following a child in a yellow jacket through a pedestrian area filled with blue-lit planters and towering glass skyscrapers, including the Fourth Wall building. As the child moves forward, the camera climbs a vivid yellow outdoor staircase, shifting the perspective upward toward the open sky. The scene then enters a covered walkway enclosed by vibrant neon billboards and cyan lighting, passing a pink Watson Whore sign and scattered debris before emerging from the corridor. Finally, the camera opens onto a wide overlook of a downtown street lined with palm trees, tilting upward to reveal massive holographic advertisements clinging to mega-skyscrapers against a darkening blue sky.
